rows.Name: Jacob Gauptman
rows.Notes:
PAUSED BY CUSTOMER
Unfortunately, we need to place the search on hold for now. We were expecting to onboard a major new client that would have supported the team’s expansion, but that deal ultimately fell through. Without it, I don’t currently have the ability or internal approval to move forward with hiring until we gain additional traction and proof of concept.

I’m not sure on the exact timing, but I expect we’ll likely be in a position to revisit this closer to summer.

I genuinely appreciate all your work and hope we can pick things back up sooner rather than later.
